SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Enum Class ReliefCause

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ReliefCause>
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.ReliefCause
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ReliefCause>, Constable
public enum ReliefCause extends Enum<ReliefCause>
Credible overpressure causes recognised by Equinor TR3001 (Process safety) and API STD 521 6th edition section 4.4.

Each constant carries a short human-readable label and the governing requirement reference (TR3001 SR-clause and/or API STD 521 section) so that a generated relief scenario is traceable to the standard that mandates its consideration.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    BLOCKED_OUTLET
    Blocked outlet from equipment (TR3001 4.7.2 / API 521 4.4.2).
    CHECK_VALVE_LEAKAGE
    Leakage through check valve(s) (TR3001 4.7.3 / API 521 4.4.9.3).
    CHOKE_COLLAPSE
    Choke collapse on inlet arrangement (TR3001 4.8.4.5).
    CONTROL_VALVE_FAILURE
    Control valve failure, fail-open / increased Cv (TR3001 4.7.7).
    FIRE
    External fire relief (TR3001 4.7.8 / API 521 4.4.13.2.4).
    GAS_BLOW_BY
    Gas blow-by on loss of liquid level (TR3001 4.7.4 / API 521 4.4.8.3).
    INADVERTENT_VALVE_OPENING
    Inadvertent valve opening (TR3001 4.7.6 / API 521 4.4.9.2).
    LIQUID_BLOW_BY
    Liquid blow-by on loss of interface level (TR3001 4.7.4 / API 521 4.4.8.3).
    OTHER
    Any other / user-defined cause.
    THERMAL_EXPANSION
    Thermal expansion of trapped/blocked-in liquid (TR3001 4.8.6.3 / API 521 4.4.12).
    TUBE_RUPTURE
    Heat-exchanger tube rupture (TR3001 4.8.6.2 / API 521 4.4.14).
    VACUUM
    Vacuum / external pressure collapse (TR3001 5 / API 521 4.4.15).
    VOLATILE_LIQUID_INGRESS
    Entrance of volatile liquids into a warmer system (TR3001 4.7.5 / API 521 4.4.6).

    • BLOCKED_OUTLET

      public static final ReliefCause BLOCKED_OUTLET
      Blocked outlet from equipment (TR3001 4.7.2 / API 521 4.4.2).

    • CHECK_VALVE_LEAKAGE

      Leakage through check valve(s) (TR3001 4.7.3 / API 521 4.4.9.3).

    • GAS_BLOW_BY

      Gas blow-by on loss of liquid level (TR3001 4.7.4 / API 521 4.4.8.3).

    • LIQUID_BLOW_BY

      public static final ReliefCause LIQUID_BLOW_BY
      Liquid blow-by on loss of interface level (TR3001 4.7.4 / API 521 4.4.8.3).

    • VOLATILE_LIQUID_INGRESS

      public static final ReliefCause VOLATILE_LIQUID_INGRESS
      Entrance of volatile liquids into a warmer system (TR3001 4.7.5 / API 521 4.4.6).

    • INADVERTENT_VALVE_OPENING

      public static final ReliefCause INADVERTENT_VALVE_OPENING
      Inadvertent valve opening (TR3001 4.7.6 / API 521 4.4.9.2).

    • CONTROL_VALVE_FAILURE

      public static final ReliefCause CONTROL_VALVE_FAILURE
      Control valve failure, fail-open / increased Cv (TR3001 4.7.7).

    • FIRE

      public static final ReliefCause FIRE
      External fire relief (TR3001 4.7.8 / API 521 4.4.13.2.4).

    • THERMAL_EXPANSION

      public static final ReliefCause THERMAL_EXPANSION
      Thermal expansion of trapped/blocked-in liquid (TR3001 4.8.6.3 / API 521 4.4.12).

    • CHOKE_COLLAPSE

      public static final ReliefCause CHOKE_COLLAPSE
      Choke collapse on inlet arrangement (TR3001 4.8.4.5).

    • TUBE_RUPTURE

      public static final ReliefCause TUBE_RUPTURE
      Heat-exchanger tube rupture (TR3001 4.8.6.2 / API 521 4.4.14).

    • VACUUM

      public static final ReliefCause VACUUM
      Vacuum / external pressure collapse (TR3001 5 / API 521 4.4.15).

    • OTHER

      public static final ReliefCause OTHER
      Any other / user-defined cause.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReliefCause

      private ReliefCause(String label, String standardReference)
      Creates a relief cause constant.
      Parameters:
      label - short human-readable label for the cause
      standardReference - governing TR3001 SR-clause and/or API STD 521 section reference

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static ReliefCause[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static ReliefCause valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getLabel

      public String getLabel()
      Gets the short human-readable label for this cause.
      Returns:
      the cause label

    • getStandardReference

      public String getStandardReference()
      Gets the governing standard reference (TR3001 SR-clause and/or API STD 521 section) for this cause.
      Returns:
      the standard reference string
